events Past Cases Review 2 Contacts and resources Safer recruitment and DBS Diocesan Safeguarding Advisory Panel Reports and newsletters Safeguarding Audit Mission Support for Parishes Welcome The Mission Department exists to serve the parishes of the Diocese of Southwark, supporting local churches to thrive in all areas of Christian mission. This is a brief overview of some of what we do and how we can help you. Do contact the team for more information and advice. Mission Support for Parishes Mission Action Planning Listen and reflect Act and review Discern and plan Foundation Training Pioneering Ministry and Fresh Expressions Greenhouse What are Fresh Expressions?
